overview: Sir C.V. Raman Institute of Technology and Sciences (CVRT), located in Tadipatri, Anantapuramu District, Andhra Pradesh, is a private engineering institution focused on technical education, industry-oriented training, and career development. The institute offers undergraduate, postgraduate, and diploma programs in engineering and technology disciplines with active placement support and state scholarship assistance.

coursesAndFees.tuitionFee: Convenor Quota (Category A): Approximately ₹43,000 per year (Total ~₹1.72 Lakhs for 4 years). Management Quota (Category B): Variable depending on specialization and demand.
Approximately ₹43,000 – ₹57,000 per year depending on specialization.

placements.totalOffers: Multiple placement offers through campus and pooled recruitment drives
placements.companiesVisited: Micron Technology, IBM, Deloitte, Amdocs, Mphasis, Robert Bosch, Infosys, HCL

admissions.admissionProcess: Admissions are primarily based on Andhra Pradesh state-level entrance examinations followed by centralized counseling and management quota admissions.
admissions.importantDates: Follows APSCHE counseling schedules and academic calendar notifications.

campus.area: Campus located in Tadipatri, Anantapuramu District, Andhra Pradesh
campus.specialNote: Hostel and mess charges range approximately between ₹45,000 – ₹60,000 annually depending on room configuration. One-time admission and caution charges may range from ₹5,000 – ₹10,000.

contact.address: Sir C.V. Raman Institute of Technology and Sciences, Behind Bharat Petrol Bunk, Anantapur Road, Tadipatri, Ananthapuramu District, Andhra Pradesh 515411

hostel.note: Hostel and mess combined fee for standard residential facilities.

scholarships.name: Jagananna Vidya Deevena (JVD)
scholarships.description: Annual tuition reimbursement for eligible AP state candidates from lower economic classifications.

scholarships.name: Post-Metric Scholarships
scholarships.description: Government stipends for eligible SC, ST, BC, and EBC students.

scholarships.name: AICTE Tuition Fee Waiver (TFW)
scholarships.description: Restricted merit-based tuition waiver seats for candidates under the ?8 LPA family income threshold.
